meaning: n.(罗马)拉特兰教堂,拉特兰宫(现为博物馆)
examples: The fourth Lateran Council, in 1215, was of crucial importance.
The English were the first to put into practice the decrees of the Lateran Council.
He holds a doctorate in Canon and civil law from the University of St. John Lateran.
John in Lateran Basilica to honor a past pope who remains wildly popular in Rome.
John Lateran, the official seat of the bishop of Rome.
